summary: Install-time host reconnaissance beacon to poc.khz.bar
details: Both preinstall and postinstall lifecycle hooks execute index.js, which collects os.hostname(), all non-internal network interface IP addresses, process.cwd(), and directory listings of the current working directory, /app, and../../, then POSTs the JSON payload over plain HTTP to http://poc.khz.bar/install. Triggered automatically on npm install. The package is published under the @limebike scope but its README header reads '@doctolib-apps/native-personalized-services' and is tagged 'Claimed by dphoeniixx' — a dependency-confusion / namespace-abuse shape against an internal-named package. Any installer who accidentally resolves this public package leaks host identity and filesystem reconnaissance to the attacker-controlled domain.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
